purpose: Define the governed types and their required runstate layers.
instruction: Return not_applicable when the target is not workflow-bearing.
Require workflow and stage checklists for workflow_runtime targets.
Require all three checklist layers for skill_flow_orchestrator targets.
workflow: Inspect target topology and explicit runstate contract if present.
Infer governed_type only when no explicit runstate contract exists.
Emit scaffold and success criteria for the chosen governed_type.
rules: Do not fabricate workflow or stage requirements for not_applicable targets.
Skill-flow orchestration implies Skills_runtime_checklist in addition to workflow and stage checklists.
